title: bot: Response events silently discarded with no logging
description: In main.rs lines 196-198, all ClientEvent::Response messages from the relay are ignored. The bot sends BROADCAST and SET_NICKNAME commands but discards any relay responses without logging. This violates error handling discipline: we cannot distinguish between 'relay sent no response' and 'we got a response but threw it away'. Correct behavior: log responses at debug level or maintain request ID tracking to match responses to requests.
